title: eleocharis variegata
intro: Eleocharis variegata, also known as variegated spike-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family that is commonly found in wetlands and aquatic environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis variegata include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a diuretic and to reduce swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
